title: nagan #5059
definition:
1) to play or strike strings, play a stringed instrument
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) player (participle)
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to play
             1b1a) player, minstrel (participle)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to play or strike strings, play a stringed instrument
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) player (participle)
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to play
             1b1a) player, minstrel (participle)

    NASB:  to touch or play a stringed instrument
